title: Histotechnician
description: Providence Health is seeking a remote Histotechnician to support our pathology laboratory operations across Michigan. You'll process tissue specimens, prepare microscope slides, and ensure quality throughout the histology workflow. This remote role is ideal for someone seeking flexibility while contributing to diagnostic excellence across our health system.
responsibilities: Process tissue specimens using automated and manual techniques, following established protocols and quality standards
Prepare slides through staining, mounting, and cover-slipping processes; ensure consistent slide quality
Operate and maintain histology equipment; perform preventive maintenance and troubleshoot issues
Track specimens through the workflow system and maintain accurate documentation
Collaborate with laboratory supervisors to improve efficiency and maintain laboratory certifications

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED; completion of accredited histotechnology program
